ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gloves" (
  "glove_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of glove */,
  "glove_type" TEXT /* Type of glove material (e.g., Latex, Nitrile) */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost category (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "chemical_resistance" TEXT /* General chemical resistance level */,
  "recommended_uses" TEXT /* Recommended uses for the glove */,
  "disadvantages" TEXT /* Disadvantages of using the glove */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the glove in mm */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the glove (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the glove in grams */,
  "material_composition" TEXT /* Material composition of the glove */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("glove_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_types" (
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical */,
  "chemical_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical */,
  "hazard_level" TEXT /* Hazard level of the chemical (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "recommended_gloves" TEXT /* Recommended gloves for handling the chemical */,
  "handling_precautions" TEXT /* Precautions for handling the chemical */,
  "storage_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for storing the chemical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_guidelines" (
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety guideline */,
  "guideline_text" TEXT /* Text of the safety guideline */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the guideline became effective */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the guideline was last revised */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guideline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the training module */,
  "module_title" TEXT /* Title of the training module */,
  "module_description" TEXT /* Description of the training module */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the module was created */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the module was last revised */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training module in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_training" (
  "user_training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user training record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user taking the training */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training module */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the training module was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the user on the training module (e.g., percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_training_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES training_modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_training_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the review */,
  "glove_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glove being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_glove_id FOREIGN KEY ("glove_id") REFERENCES gloves ("glove_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_resistances" (
  "resistance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the resistance entry */,
  "glove_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glove related to this resistance */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical being referenced */,
  "resistance_level" TEXT /* Level of resistance (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Test method used to determine resistance */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the resistance test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resistance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_resistances_glove_id FOREIGN KEY ("glove_id") REFERENCES gloves ("glove_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_resistances_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemical_types ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of products supplied (e.g., gloves, goggles) */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the supplier (e.g., ISO 9001) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_products" (
  "supplier_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the supplier product entry */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier offering the product */,
  "glove_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glove being supplied */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the glove from the supplier */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the glove */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the glove (e.g., when to reorder stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_products_glove_id FOREIGN KEY ("glove_id") REFERENCES gloves ("glove_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the version entry */,
  "glove_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glove related to this version */,
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guideline related to this version */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_glove_id FOREIGN KEY ("glove_id") REFERENCES gloves ("glove_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_guideline_id FOREIGN KEY ("guideline_id") REFERENCES safety_guidelines ("guideline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_storage" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the file entry */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "file_content" TEXT /* Content of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)
